'''鈭歯-w-ng-t''' ('''kanawngetoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:ease|ease]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-w-ng-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:ease|ease]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯-w-ng-t
|-
! Lemma
| kanawngetoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinawngetoko|thinawngetoko]] || [[word:jinawngetoko|jinawngetoko]] || [[word:shinawngetoko|shinawngetoko]] || [[word:kinawngetoko|kinawngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunawngetoko|thuthunawngetoko]] || [[word:jujunawngetoko|jujunawngetoko]] || [[word:shushunawngetoko|shushunawngetoko]] || [[word:kukunawngetoko|kukunawngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thunawngetoko|thunawngetoko]] || [[word:junawngetoko|junawngetoko]] || [[word:shunawngetoko|shunawngetoko]] || [[word:kunawngetoko|kunawngetoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thunawngetoko|thunawngetoko]] || [[word:junawngetoko|junawngetoko]] || [[word:shunawngetoko|shunawngetoko]] || [[word:kunawngetoko|kunawngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thenawngetoko|thenawngetoko]] || [[word:jenawngetoko|jenawngetoko]] || [[word:shenawngetoko|shenawngetoko]] || [[word:kenawngetoko|kenawngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothonawngetoko|thothonawngetoko]] || [[word:jojonawngetoko|jojonawngetoko]] || [[word:shoshonawngetoko|shoshonawngetoko]] || [[word:kokonawngetoko|kokonawngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonawngetoko|thonawngetoko]] || [[word:jonawngetoko|jonawngetoko]] || [[word:shonawngetoko|shonawngetoko]] || [[word:konawngetoko|konawngetoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonawngetoko|thonawngetoko]] || [[word:jonawngetoko|jonawngetoko]] || [[word:shonawngetoko|shonawngetoko]] || [[word:konawngetoko|konawngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙nawngetoko|th忙nawngetoko]] || [[word:j忙nawngetoko|j忙nawngetoko]] || [[word:sh忙nawngetoko|sh忙nawngetoko]] || [[word:k忙nawngetoko|k忙nawngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanawngetoko|thathanawngetoko]] || [[word:jajanawngetoko|jajanawngetoko]] || [[word:shashanawngetoko|shashanawngetoko]] || [[word:kakanawngetoko|kakanawngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanawngetoko|thanawngetoko]] || [[word:janawngetoko|janawngetoko]] || [[word:shanawngetoko|shanawngetoko]] || [[word:kanawngetoko|kanawngetoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanawngetoko|thanawngetoko]] || [[word:janawngetoko|janawngetoko]] || [[word:shanawngetoko|shanawngetoko]] || [[word:kanawngetoko|kanawngetoko]]
|}
=== [[Patient]] agreement ===
''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''

! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
